channel.title: Home on linuxrepos
channel.description: Recent content in Home on linuxrepos

item.title: Dism++
item.description: Dism++ enables users to modify Windows images before installing them, as well as providing tools to address and repair common issues like missing or corrupted files.

item.title: Ext4 in Windows
item.description: Pulling in EXT4 drives is easy now with Windows WSL2. There are a few tricks that you need to know about though!

item.title: Why Open Source?
item.description: Why is open source done? The developer gives up all his code and potential for profit from the code.

item.title: Thumbnails in Windows
item.description: The thumbnail system in Windows has 4 major configuration areas dating back to 2000. From thumbs.db files, checkboxes, group policy, and registry edits, the Windows thumbnail system is, like everything in Windows, old and layered.

item.title: Fix Screen Tearing Linux
item.description: The guide shows you ALL the methods to remove screen tearing. VSync, Monitor Composition, and Drivers that are problem childs.

item.title: Updated the Theme
item.description: Today I updated my websites theme to look a bit nicer but i will be doing more later.

item.title: The Launch of Shellfetch
item.description: Hello guys and gals, today I have launched my all new and improved fetch tool called shellfetch

item.title: New Website
item.description: Welcome to our website over the past few weeks we have been hard at work to bring you the best site we could.

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description: This privacy policy covers how this blog treats personal information it receives from visitors.
